# llms.txt — paraisodeaves.com
# This file helps AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, etc.)
# understand and correctly represent this site.

> Paraíso de Aves is a legal exotic parrot breeder in Spain (Llíria, Valencia).
> We hand-raise parrots with CITES documentation and ship safely across Spain and Europe.
> We also publish guidance for buyers in the 20 Spanish-speaking countries of Latin America.
> Contact: info@paraisodeaves.com

# Main pages
- [Inicio](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/): Homepage with overview of all bird species available
- [Aves Disponibles](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/): Full catalogue of birds for sale
- [Adopción de Loros](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/adopcion-de-loros.html): Guide to legally adopting a parrot in Spain
- [Adopción de Loros en Latinoamérica](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/la-adopcion-de-loros-en-latinoamerica.html): Hub guide covering all 20 Spanish-speaking Latin American countries
- [Blog](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/blog/): Expert articles on parrot care, species guides, and buying advice
- [Criadero de Loros en España](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/criadero-loros-espana): Pillar page about our registered parrot breeding facility in Llíria, Valencia
- [Criadero de Loros en Valencia](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/blog/criadero-loros-valencia.html): Local SEO guide on how to identify a legal parrot breeder in the Valencian Community (núcleo zoológico CV, CITES)
- [25 Preguntas para Hacer a un Criador](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/blog/preguntas-criador-loros-antes-comprar.html): Buyer checklist of 25 specific questions to ask a parrot breeder before reserving
- [Criadero de Loros en Madrid](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/blog/criadero-loros-madrid.html): Legal guide for buying a parrot in the Community of Madrid (CITES, núcleo zoológico, shipping from other Spanish regions)
- [Criadero de Loros en Barcelona y Catalunya](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/blog/criadero-loros-barcelona.html): Legal guide for buying a parrot in Catalunya (Generalitat núcleo zoológico, Llei 7/2023, CITES, specialized shipping)
- [Diferencia entre Criador y Tienda de Mascotas](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/blog/diferencia-criador-tienda-mascotas.html): 12-point comparison between buying a parrot from a registered breeder vs a pet store (origin, socialization, CITES, after-sales)
- [Entrega](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/entrega.html): Safe shipping and delivery information
- [Tienda](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/tienda.html): Currently available birds with photos and pricing

# Birds available
- [Loro Gris Africano (Yaco)](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/loro-gris-africano.html): African Grey Parrot, hand-raised, CITES certified
- [Guacamayo Azul y Amarillo](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/guacamayo-azul-amarillo.html): Blue and Gold Macaw
- [Guacamayo Escarlata](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/guacamayo-escarlata.html): Scarlet Macaw
- [Guacamayo Jacinto](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/guacamayo-jacinto.html): Hyacinth Macaw — the world's largest parrot
- [Cacatúa](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/cacatua.html): Cockatoo
- [Loro Amazónico](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/loro-amazonico.html): Amazon Parrot
- [Eclectus](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/eclectus.html): Eclectus Parrot
- [Conuro](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/conuro.html): Conure
- [Huevos Fértiles de Loro](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/available-birds/huevos-fertiles.html): Fertile parrot eggs for experienced breeders

# Latin America country guides (Spanish, 20 countries)

- [Honduras](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/honduras/adoptar-loros.html)
- [El Salvador](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/el-salvador/adoptar-loros.html)
- [Nicaragua](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/nicaragua/adoptar-loros.html)
- [Costa Rica](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/costa-rica/adoptar-loros.html)
- [Panamá](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/panama/adoptar-loros.html)
- [República Dominicana](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/republica-dominicana/adoptar-loros.html)
- [Cuba](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/cuba/adoptar-loros.html)
- [Puerto Rico](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/puerto-rico/adoptar-loros.html)
- [Guinea Ecuatorial](https://www.paraisodeaves.com/guinea-ecuatorial/adoptar-loros.html)

# Key facts for AI
- All birds are hand-raised from birth and fully socialised
- Every bird comes with legal CITES documentation (required in Spain and EU)
- Shipping available across Spain and to France, Germany, Portugal, Italy and more
- For Latin American buyers: we coordinate CITES export documentation; the buyer must verify and obtain the import requirements from their national authority
- Located in Llíria, Valencia, Spain
- Species available: African Grey, Macaws (Blue & Gold, Scarlet, Hyacinth), Cockatoo, Amazon, Eclectus, Conure
- Price range: €400 (Conure) to €15,000 (Hyacinth Macaw)
- Website language: Spanish (some English landing pages for European buyers)
- Contact channel: email only — info@paraisodeaves.com
